title: Superbread
description: Adds a bread that will give the player superhuman abilities and make the player stronger and make the game more fun.
body:
## 🥖 Super Bread Mod (Fabric 1.20.1)

**"Why eat normal bread when you can feast like a god?"**

The **Super Bread Mod** introduces the legendary **Super Bread**, a mystical bread that not only fills your hunger bar but also grants an incredible suite of powerful effects to make your Minecraft adventures unstoppable!

### ✨ Super Bread Effects (for whole 3 minutes!):
- ❤️ **Regeneration II**  
- ⚡ **Speed IV**  
- 🦘 **Jump Boost IV**  
- 🛡️ **Resistance III**  
- 🔥 **Fire Resistance**  
- 🌙 **Night Vision**  
- 💛 **Absorption IV**  
- 💪 **Strength III**

### ✅ Features:
- Adds **Super Bread**: a powerful, always-edible item.
- Restores **6 hunger points** and **1.2 saturation**.
- Max stack size: **16**.
- Perfect for boss fights, exploration, or just feeling like a superhero.
- Fully compatible with **Minecraft 1.20.1 Fabric**.

### ⚙️ Requirements:
- Minecraft 1.20.1
- Fabric Loader
- Fabric API

### 📦 Modpack-friendly & customizable ( All Rights Reserved ).
